code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(cur)
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut unique: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  if not list.contains(unique, x)
    unique = list.push(unique, x)
  end
end

mut remaining = unique
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
let total = list.len(remaining)
mut k = 0
while k < total
  match list.min(remaining)
  when Some(m)
    sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
    mut next_remaining: List<Int> = []
    for y in remaining
      if y != m
        next_remaining = list.push(next_remaining, y)
      end
    end
    remaining = next_remaining
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for z in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{z}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{z}"
  end
end
println(out)
